title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 506.363 - Definitions
text:
506.363.  Definitions. — For the purposes of sections 506.360 to 506.390, "offender" and "correctional center" shall have the same meaning as defined in section 217.010; and the terms "court costs" and "fees" shall have the same meaning as defined in section 488.010.
(L. 1997 S.B. 56 § 2, A.L. 1999 S.B. 1, et al.)
